fault_conditions.name: check_valve_leaking
fault_conditions.description: Check valve (CV) leaking causing excessive oil flow through air inlet filter after stopping
fault_conditions.symptoms: Excessive oil flow through air inlet filter after stopping
fault_conditions.evidence: Check valve (CV) leaking or oil stop valve (Vs) jammed. Have defective parts replaced. Replace air filter element (AF).

maintenance_actions.name: replace_defective_check_valve
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Prevents oil flow through air inlet filter after stopping
maintenance_actions.evidence: Have defective parts replaced. Replace air filter element (AF).

assumptions.statement: Check valve prevents blow-back of compressed air when compressor is stopped
assumptions.reason: Component role provided but no specific operating details found in manual excerpts

assumptions.statement: Check valve failure requires replacement rather than repair
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Have defective parts replaced' rather than repair procedures
